name: Chocolate Chip Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Sift dry ingredients together; add to creamed mixture alternately with water and vanilla.
5. Fold in carrots, nuts, and chips.
6. Turn batter into prepared 9 x 13-inch pan.
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
8. Cool and frost with Cream Cheese Frosting.
